Agentic Services  ›  COBie Data by Email

COBie Data by Email

Managed by Adelphos · Per-project subscription billed against deliverable issues

Email a model. Get back a fully-populated COBie deliverable.

A bespoke email address that fills out the entire COBie deliverable from your model — Type, Component, Attribute, Job, all 20+ sheets — deterministically.

Email cobie@adelphos.ai SLA: Same-day for Stage 4 issues; 24 hours for hand-over packages
Send a brief to cobie@adelphos.ai → See how it works
Same-dayStage 4 issue turnaround
20+ sheetsall populated, none left blank by default
Traceableevery cell to a source element
Validatedagainst BS 1192-4 + EIR

Description

Email cobie@adelphos.ai with the final Revit model attached or linked. Within hours, the agent returns a COBie 2.4 spreadsheet (.xlsx) with every sheet populated — Facility, Floor, Space, Zone, Type, Component, System, Assembly, Connection, Spare, Resource, Job, Document, Attribute, Coordinate, Issue, Contact and the rest.

Every populated cell is traceable to the source Revit element (or to the source the agent inferred it from). Cells the model can't fill are explicitly marked 'awaiting' rather than left blank, with a note on what's needed to complete them.

A human reviewer on our service team validates the deliverable against the project's COBie expectations (BS 1192-4 compliance, EIR requirements, client-specific overlays) before it lands in your inbox. For a typical commercial scheme this replaces 3–5 days of manual COBie population with a 30-minute review.

COBie by Email will be the only COBie service that returns a complete, traceable, audit-ready spreadsheet — every time, from one email.

The shift

What running this part of the business looks like today, versus with COBie Data by Email.

Before

COBie is the unloved deliverable: someone gets dropped on the team a week before hand-over to populate the spreadsheet manually. Half the cells get filled, the client moans, the next project does the same.

After COBie Data by Email

Send the final model. Get back a COBie deliverable with every populated cell traceable to a source element. Issue with confidence.

What we offer

  • Per-project bespoke email address
  • Full COBie 2.4 (or COBie UK 2012) coverage
  • Source traceability per cell
  • BS 1192-4 + project EIR validation
  • Client-specific overlay support (NHS, MoJ, etc.)
  • Human reviewer sign-off before delivery

How it becomes agentic

We don't drop a tool on your desk and walk away. We move you up an automation maturity ladder over weeks, not years, with a human on every step until the agent has earned autonomy.

1. Onboard — we set up the project email + load any client-specific COBie expectations into your tenant.
2. First issue — send the model at any project gateway; we return the populated COBie deliverable the same day.
3. Iteration — reply with a new model version, get the deltas; the agent updates only changed rows.
4. Hand-over — final issue includes the audit log mapping every cell to its source.
5. Steady-state — COBie stops being a person on your team.

Features

Everything COBie Data by Email ships with as a managed service. Each item is a concrete capability — no marketing fluff.

  • Bespoke project email address Each project gets its own thread — context carries between emails.
  • Revit + IFC input Send a Revit model or an IFC; the agent handles both.
  • Full COBie 2.4 coverage Every standard sheet populated, not just the easy ones.
  • Source traceability Every populated cell traces to its source Revit element.
  • Awaiting flags Cells the model can't fill are marked 'awaiting' with what's needed.
  • BS 1192-4 + EIR validation Validated against the standard and the project's EIR before delivery.
  • Client-specific overlays Apply client-specific COBie expectations (NHS, MoJ, university trusts).
  • Human service review A reviewer signs off every deliverable before it leaves us.

How we work together

Engagement model

Per-project subscription billed against deliverable issues + a monthly review of EIR alignment

Related

Agentic service Finances Most practices lose hours every week to financial admin. We replace that loop with an agent connected to your accounting system, project tracker, and bank feed — with a human service team checking every issue. App CoBie Manager Continuously populates and validates the COBie spreadsheet against the live Revit model. Every cell traceable to its source element.

Frequently asked questions

Quick answers AI engines (and humans) can pull from.

What is COBie Data by Email?

A bespoke email address that fills out the entire COBie deliverable from your model — Type, Component, Attribute, Job, all 20+ sheets — deterministically.

What does COBie Data by Email do?

Email cobie@adelphos.ai with the final Revit model attached or linked. Within hours, the agent returns a COBie 2.4 spreadsheet (.xlsx) with every sheet populated — Facility, Floor, Space, Zone, Type, Component, System, Assembly, Connection, Spare, Resource, Job, Document, Attribute, Coordinate, Issue, Contact and the rest.

How is COBie Data by Email different from the manual workflow?

Without COBie Data by Email: COBie is the unloved deliverable: someone gets dropped on the team a week before hand-over to populate the spreadsheet manually. Half the cells get filled, the client moans, the next project does the same. With COBie Data by Email: Send the final model. Get back a COBie deliverable with every populated cell traceable to a source element. Issue with confidence.

How much time does COBie Data by Email save?

Headline outcomes for COBie Data by Email: Same-day (Stage 4 issue turnaround); 20+ sheets (all populated, none left blank by default); Traceable (every cell to a source element); Validated (against BS 1192-4 + EIR).

What's the engagement model for COBie Data by Email?

Per-project subscription billed against deliverable issues + a monthly review of EIR alignment
